title: USDA Forecasts Record-High Soybean Production in 2017
summary: U.S. farmers are expected to produce a record-high soybean crop this year, according to the Crop Production report issued today by the USDA’s National Agricultural Statistics Service. Up 2 percent from 2016, soybean production is forecast at 4.38 billion bushels, while corn growers are expected to d...

title: Southcentral Alaska Avalanche Workshop – Friday, Nov 3rd!!
summary: Register now for Friday November 3rd's 5th annual 'SAAW' (Southcentral Alaska Avalanche Workshop)!! We have an amazing line-up scheduled, special guest Ethan Greene from Colorado Avalanche Information Center! Event Website: akavalancheworkshop.org
